message:
feat(resolv): return multi-address addrinfo chains and add membrane policy to resolver functions

getaddrinfo multi-result support:
- Refactor getaddrinfo to collect multiple addrinfo nodes into a Vec
  and chain them via ai_next pointers, matching glibc behavior for
  hosts with multiple addresses
- Parse all /etc/hosts matches via frankenlibc_core::resolv::lookup_hosts
  instead of taking only the first match
- When node is NULL and family is AF_UNSPEC, return both IPv4 and IPv6
  unspecified addresses (was returning only IPv4)
- Separate AF_INET and AF_INET6 cases for NULL node

Membrane policy integration:
- Add runtime_policy::decide/observe calls to gethostbyaddr,
  getservbyname, getservbyport, and getprotobyname for consistent
  security policy enforcement across all resolver functions
- Deny actions return appropriate error codes (NO_RECOVERY, null)

setjmp cleanup:
- Remove unused context_id and generation fields from JumpRegistryEntry
  (data is stored in JmpBuf itself since serialization change)
- Remove unused mem_env variable in restore_env

setjmp test:
- Add jmpbuf_serialization_roundtrip test verifying to_bytes/from_bytes
  preserves context_id, generation, owner_thread, and guard values

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
